response:
```sql
SELECT
  T1.title
FROM shows AS T1
INNER JOIN show_directors AS T2
  ON T1.show_id = T2.show_id
INNER JOIN directors AS T3
  ON T2.director_id = T3.director_id
INNER JOIN show_genres AS T4
  ON T1.show_id = T4.show_id
INNER JOIN genres AS T5
  ON T4.genre_id = T5.genre_id
WHERE
  T3.name = 'Ben Jones' AND T5.genre_name = 'Cartoon';
```
